arguments.content:
# Technical Architecture Document
## AI Workflow Automation for Legal/Consulting Verticals

**Phase 3 Deliverable** | **Version 1.0** | **Date:** $(date +%Y-%m-%d)

---

## 1. System Architecture Diagram

### High-Level Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                              CLIENT LAYER                                    │
│  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────────────┐  │
│  │  Web App    │  │  Mobile     │  │  Browser    │  │  Partner APIs       │  │
│  │  (React)    │  │  (React     │  │  Extension  │  │  (External Systems)  │  │
│  │             │  │   Native)   │  │             │  │                     │  │
│  └──────┬──────┘  └──────┬──────┘  └──────┬──────┘  └──────────┬──────────┘  │
└─────────┼────────────────┼────────────────┼────────────────────┼───────────┘
          │                │                │                    │
          └────────────────┴────────────────┴────────────────────┘
                                     │
                                     ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                           API GATEWAY LAYER                                │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │                    Kong/AWS API Gateway                            │   │
│  │  ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ │   │
│  │  │ Rate     │ │  Auth    │ │ Request  │ │   SSL    │ │  CORS    │ │   │
│  │  │ Limiting │ │  /JWT    │ │  Logging │ │ Terminat.│ │  Handler │ │   │
│  │  └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                     │
                                     ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                         APPLICATION SERVICES LAYER                         │
│                                                                             │
│  ┌──────────────────┐  ┌──────────────────┐  ┌────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  Workflow        │  │  Document        │  │  AI/ML Services        │   │
│  │  Engine Service  │  │  Processing      │  │  (Kubernetes Cluster)  │   │
│  │  (Node.js)       │  │  Service         │  │                        │   │
│  │                  │  │  (Python)        │  │  ┌────────────────┐    │   │
│  │  • Workflow      │  │                  │  │  │ LLM Gateway    │    │   │
│  │    orchestration │  │  • OCR/Extraction│  │  │ (OpenAI API)   │    │   │
│  │  • State mechan. │  │  • PII detection │  │  ├────────────────┤    │   │
│  │  • Version ctrl  │  │  • Redaction     │  │  │ Embedding      │    │   │
│  │  • Audit logging │  │  • Classification│  │  │ (Pinecone)     │    │   │
│  └──────────────────┘  └──────────────────┘  │  ├────────────────┤    │   │
│                                               │  │ Classification │    │   │
│  ┌──────────────────┐  ┌──────────────────┐  │  │ (Fine-tuned)   │    │   │
│  │  Integration     │  │  Notification    │  │  └────────────────┘    │   │
│  │  Service         │  │  Service           │  └────────────────────────┘   │
│  │  (Node.js)       │  │  (Node.js)         │                             │
│  │                  │  │                    │                             │
│  │  • 3rd party     │  │  • Email           │                             │
│  │    connectors    │  │  • Slack           │                             │
│  │  • Webhooks      │  │  • SMS             │                             │
│  │  • API proxies   │  │  • In-app          │                             │
│  └──────────────────┘  └──────────────────┘                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                     │
                                     ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                            DATA LAYER                                      │
│                                                                             │
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌─────────────────┐  │
│  │  PostgreSQL  │  │    Redis     │  │   S3/MinIO   │  │  Elasticsearch  │  │
│  │  (Primary    │  │   (Cache &   │  │  (Document   │  │  (Search &      │  │
│  │   Database)  │  │   Session)   │  │   Storage)   │  │   Analytics)    │  │
│  │              │  │              │  │              │  │                 │  │
│  │  • User data │  │  • Queues    │  │  • Encrypted │  │  • Full-text    │  │
│  │  • Workflows │  │  • Sessions  │  │    at-rest   │  │    search       │  │
│  │  • Audit log │  │  • Caching   │  │  • Retention │  │  • Analytics    │  │
│  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └─────────────────┘  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Service Communication Patterns

| Pattern | Use Case | Implementation |
|---------|----------|----------------|
| **Synchronous REST** | CRUD operations, immediate responses | Express.js/FastAPI with HTTP/2 |
| **Async Event-Driven** | Workflow triggers, document processing | RabbitMQ / Apache Kafka |
| **WebSocket** | Real-time updates, live collaboration | Socket.io with Redis adapter |
| **Webhook** | External system notifications | Signed webhooks with HMAC |

---

## 2. API Specifications

### 2.1 Core Automation Endpoints

#### Workflow Management

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Workflow Automation API
  version: 1.0.0

paths:
  /api/v1/workflows:
    get:
      summary: List workflows
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query

            type: string

        - name: template
          in: query

            type: boolean
      responses:

          description: List of workflows

            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object

    post:
      summary: Create workflow

        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [name, definition]

                name:
                  type: string
                  maxLength: 200
                description:
                  type: string

                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowDefinition'
                template_id:
                  type: string
      responses:
        201:
          description: Workflow created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Workflow'

  /api/v1/workflows/{id}/instances:
    post:
      summary: Trigger workflow instance
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        content:

            schema:
              type: object
              required: [trigger_data]

                  default: normal
      responses:
        201

arguments.content:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Legal Workflow Automation API
  description: |
    API specification for AI Workflow Automation platform targeting Legal and Consulting verticals.
    
    ## Key Features
    - Workflow orchestration with visual designer support
    - Document processing with AI-powered extraction
    - Audit logging for compliance
    - Role-based access control
    
  version: 1.0.0
  contact:
    name: API Support
    email: api@legalworkflow.io
  
servers:
  - url: https://api.legalworkflow.io/v1
    description: Production server
  - url: https://staging-api.legalworkflow.io/v1
    description: Staging server

security:
  - BearerAuth: []
  - OAuth2: [read, write]

tags:
  - name: Workflows
    description: Workflow definition and management
  - name: Instances
    description: Workflow execution instances
  - name: Documents
    description: Document upload, processing, and management
  - name: AI Services
    description: AI-powered analysis and extraction
  - name: Templates
    description: Pre-built workflow templates
  - name: Audit
    description: Audit logging for compliance
  - name: Organizations
    description: Multi-tenant organization management

paths:
  # ==========================================
  # Workflow Management
  # ==========================================
  /workflows:
    get:
      summary: List workflows
      description: Retrieve paginated list of workflows accessible to the user
      tags: [Workflows]
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          description: Filter by workflow status
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [draft, active, archived, deprecated]
        - name: template
          in: query
          description: Filter template workflows
          schema:
            type: boolean
        - name: organization_id
          in: query
          description: Filter by organization (admin only)
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uuid
        - name: limit
          in: query
          description: Number of results per page
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 20
            maximum: 100
        - name: cursor
          in: query
          description: Pagination cursor
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successfully retrieved workflows
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PaginatedWorkflows'

    post:
      summary: Create workflow
      description: Create a new workflow definition
      tags: [Workflows]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowCreate'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Workflow created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Workflow'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '422':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError'

  /workflows/{workflow_id}:
    parameters:
      - name: workflow_id
        in: path
        required: true
        schema:
          type: string
          format: uuid

    get:
      summary: Get workflow
      description: Retrieve detailed workflow definition
      tags: [Workflows]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Workflow details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Workflow'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

    put:
      summary: Update workflow
      description: Update workflow definition (creates new version)
      tags: [Workflows]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowUpdate'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Workflow updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Workflow'

    delete:
      summary: Archive workflow
      description: Soft-delete workflow (archives it)
      tags: [Workflows]
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Workflow archived

  /workflows/{workflow_id}/versions:
    parameters:
      - name: workflow_id
        in: path
        required: true
        schema:
          type: string
          format: uuid

    get:
      summary: List workflow versions
      description: Retrieve version history
      tags: [Workflows]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of versions
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  versions:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowVersion'

  # ==========================================
  # Workflow Instances
  # ==========================================
  /workflows/{workflow_id}/instances:
    parameters:
      - name: workflow_id
        in: path
        required: true
        schema:
          type: string
          format: uuid

    post:
      summary: Trigger workflow
      description: Start a new workflow instance
      tags: [Instances]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowTrigger'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Workflow instance started
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowInstance'
        '429':
          description: Rate limit exceeded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'

  /instances:
    get:
      summary: List instances
      description: List workflow instances with filtering
      tags: [Instances]
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [pending, running, completed, failed, suspended]
        - name: workflow_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uuid
        - name: started_after
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date-time
        - name: started_before
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date-time
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of instances
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PaginatedInstances'

  /instances/{instance_id}:
    parameters:
      - name: instance_id
        in: path
        required: true
        schema:
          type: string
          format: uuid

    get:
      summary: Get instance
      description: Retrieve instance status and details
      tags: [Instances]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Instance details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowInstanceDetail'

    delete:
      summary: Cancel instance
      description: Cancel running instance
      tags: [Instances]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Instance cancelled

  /instances/{instance_id}/events:
    parameters:
      - name: instance_id
        in: path
        required: true

content.thinking: Good progress. Let me continue with the technology stack document

content.text:
","format": "uuid"
    get:
      summary: Get instance events
      description: Retrieve execution event log
      tags: [Instances]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Event log
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  events:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowEvent'

  # ==========================================
  # Document Processing
  # ==========================================
  /documents:
    post:
      summary: Upload document
      description: Upload document for processing and analysis
      tags: [Documents]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [file]
              properties:
                file:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
                  description: Document file (PDF, DOCX, TXT, etc.)
                metadata:
                  type: string
                  description: JSON string of metadata
                workflow_id:
                  type: string
                  description: Associate with workflow
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Document uploaded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Document'
        '413':
          description: File too large

  /documents/{document_id}:
    parameters:
      - name: document_id
        in: path
        required: true
        schema:
          type: string
          format: uuid

    get:
      summary: Get document
      description: Retrieve document metadata and status
      tags: [Documents]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Document details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Document'

    delete:
      summary: Delete document
      description: Soft or hard delete based on retention policy
      tags: [Documents]
      parameters:
        - name: permanent
          in: query
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: false
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Document deleted

  /documents/{document_id}/download:
    parameters:
      - name: document_id
        in: path
        required: true
        schema:
          type: string
          format: uuid

    get:
      summary: Download document
      description: Retrieve original or processed document
      tags: [Documents]
      parameters:
        - name: format
          in: query
          description: Convert to format
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [original, pdf, text, redacted]
            default: original
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Document content
          content:
            application/octet-stream:
              schema:
                type: string
                format: binary

  /documents/{document_id}/analysis:
    parameters:
      - name: document_id
        in: path
        required: true
        schema:
          type: string
          format: uuid

    get:
      summary: Get analysis results
      description: Retrieve AI-powered document analysis
      tags: [AI Services]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Analysis results
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentAnalysis'

    post:
      summary: Request analysis
      description: Trigger AI analysis on document
      tags: [AI Services]
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                analysis_types:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                    enum: [entities, clauses, summary, risks, compliance]
      responses:
        '202':
          description: Analysis queued
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AnalysisJob'

  # ==========================================
  # AI-Powered Generation
  # ==========================================
  /ai/generate:
    post:
      summary: Generate content
      description: AI-powered document generation from templates
      tags: [AI Services]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [template_id, variables]
              properties:
                template_id:
                  type: string
                variables:
                  type: object
                options:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    review_required:
                      type: boolean
                      default: true
                    confidence_threshold:
                      type: number
                      default: 0.8
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Content generated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  generated_content:
                    type: string
                  confidence_score:
                    type: number
                  needs_review:
                    type: boolean

  /ai/extract:
    post:
      summary: Extract information
      description: Extract structured data from documents
      tags: [AI Services]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [document_id, extraction_schema]
              properties:
                document_id:
                  type: string
                extraction_schema:
                  type: object
                  description: JSON Schema defining expected output
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Extraction results
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object

  # ==========================================
  # Templates
  # ==========================================
  /templates:
    get:
      summary: List templates
      description: Browse available workflow templates
      tags: [Templates]
      parameters:
        - name: category
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [contracts, compliance, discovery, billing, intake]
        - name: industry
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [legal, consulting, accounting, general]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Available templates
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Template'

  /templates/{template_id}/install:
    parameters:
      - name: template_id
        in: path
        required: true
        schema:
          type: string

    post:
      summary: Install template
      description: Copy template to organization workflows
      tags: [Templates]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Template installed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Workflow'

  # ==========================================
  # Audit & Compliance
  # ==========================================
  /audit/logs:
    get:
      summary: Get audit logs
      description: Retrieve system audit trail
      tags: [Audit]
      parameters:
        - name: resource_type
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [workflow, document, instance, user, organization]
        - name: resource_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: action
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [create, update, delete, view, execute, export]
        - name: user_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: start_date
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date-time
        - name: end_date
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date-time
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Audit log entries
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  logs:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuditLog'

      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
n        - OAuth2: [read]
        - AdminRole: []

components:
  securitySchemes:
    BearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT
      description: JWT token with RS256 signing

    OAuth2:
      type: oauth2
      flows:
        authorizationCode:
          authorizationUrl: /oauth/authorize
          tokenUrl: /oauth/token
          scopes:
            read: Read access to resources
            write: Write access to resources
            admin: Administrative operations

    AdminRole:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Admin-Token
      description: Admin-only operations

  schemas:
    # ------------------------------------------
    # Base Types
    # ------------------------------------------
    Workflow:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        organization_id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        name:
          type: string
          maxLength: 200
        description:
          type: string
          maxLength: 2000
        version:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [draft, active, archived, deprecated]
        is_template:
          type: boolean
        definition:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowDefinition'
        created_by:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    WorkflowCreate:
      type: object
      required: [name, definition]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          maxLength: 200
        description:
          type: string
        definition:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowDefinition'
        is_template:
          type: boolean
          default: false

    WorkflowUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          maxLength: 200
        description:
          type: string
        definition:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowDefinition'
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [draft, active, archived]

    WorkflowDefinition:
      type: object
      required: [nodes, edges]
      properties:
        nodes:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              id:
                type: string
              type:
                type: string
                enum: [trigger, action, condition, delay, approval, ai, integration, end]
              config:
                type: object
              position:
                type: object
                properties:
                  x: { type: number }
                  y: { type: number }
        edges:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              source:
                type: string
              target:
                type: string
              condition:
                type: string
        variables:
          type: object
          description: Workflow-level variable schema

    WorkflowTrigger:
      type: object
      properties:
        trigger_data:
          type: object
          description: Initial data for workflow
        priority:
          type: string
          enum: [low, normal, high, urgent]
          default: normal
        metadata:
          type: object

    WorkflowInstance:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        workflow_id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, running, completed, failed, suspended, cancelled]
        priority:
          type: string
        current_step:
          type: string
        progress:
          type: number
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
        started_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        completed_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        created_by:
          type: string
          format: uuid

    WorkflowInstanceDetail:
      allOf:
n        - $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowInstance'
      properties:
        execution_context:
          type: object
        steps:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/WorkflowStep'

    WorkflowStep:
      type: object
      properties:
Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out.
